_publications._publicationTitle: Restoring functional neurofibromin by protein transduction.

_contextSnippet: After the initial treatment, the KF3 fibroblasts showed a decrease in NF1 mRNA levels to 15%, followed by a slow recovery to 33%
details: Achieved NF1 mRNA knockdown to 15% of control levels after 48 hours treatment in KF3 fibroblasts, with slow recovery to 33%
